---
title: "EDS M3: Something New"
format:
  html:
    theme: yeti
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: article
    output-file: index.html
  revealjs:
    output-file: revealjs.html
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
editor: visual
---

# Next module
